content: {"turn": 17, "page_state": "Jupiter DEX landing page with pre-loaded USDC↔SOL swap. Features hero messaging around trading, leverage, yield, and cross-chain transfers. Plan Step 1에 따라 팝업을 먼저 닫아야 스왑 UI와 상호작용 가능하다. Turn 16에서 동일 클릭 후 diff가 비어 있었으나, 화면상 팝업이 여전히 존재하므로 재시도한다.", "result_ok": true, "diff": {"added": [{"name": "SOL SOL So11…1112 $84.85 1.22%", "role": "link"}, {"name": "SOL SOL $84.85 1.2%", "role": "button"}, {"name": "$84.85", "role": "StaticText"}, {"name": "$84.85", "role": "InlineTextBox"}], "removed": [{"name": "Check if you are eligible for a piece of our $200K mystery rewards!", "role": "heading"}, {"name": "Claim before it’s too late!", "role": "StaticText"}, {"name": "claimable in Jupiter Extension or ", "role": "InlineTextBox"}, {"name": "Claim before it’s too late!", "role": "InlineTextBox"}, {"name": "$84.84", "role": "InlineTextBox"}, {"name": "piece of our $200K mystery ", "role": "InlineTextBox"}, {"name": "Check if you are eligible for a piece of our $200K mystery rewards!", "role": "image"}, {"name": "tokens, rewards, and surprises.
